fmiModelDescription.description: Tracking position and velocities of the aircraft and feeds the sensors

ScalarVariable.name: actuation_command.left_aileron_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Reads the actuation and thrust commands to calculate the position, rotation and velocities

ScalarVariable.name: actuation_command.right_aileron_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Reads the actuation and thrust commands to calculate the position, rotation and velocities

ScalarVariable.name: actuation_command.elevator_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Reads the actuation and thrust commands to calculate the position, rotation and velocities

ScalarVariable.name: actuation_command.rudder_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Reads the actuation and thrust commands to calculate the position, rotation and velocities

ScalarVariable.name: actuation_command.flaperon_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Reads the actuation and thrust commands to calculate the position, rotation and velocities

ScalarVariable.name: direction_command.roll_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Air vehicle orientation expressed as Euler angles in degrees.

ScalarVariable.name: direction_command.pitch_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Air vehicle orientation expressed as Euler angles in degrees.

ScalarVariable.name: direction_command.yaw_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Air vehicle orientation expressed as Euler angles in degrees.

ScalarVariable.name: lift.lift_kn
ScalarVariable.description: Aerodynamic state summary exported from wing solver.

ScalarVariable.name: lift.drag_kn
ScalarVariable.description: Aerodynamic state summary exported from wing solver.

ScalarVariable.name: lift.pitching_moment_knm
ScalarVariable.description: Aerodynamic state summary exported from wing solver.

ScalarVariable.name: thrust_in.thrust_kn
ScalarVariable.description: Propulsion output shared with performance models.

ScalarVariable.name: thrust_in.mass_flow_kgps
ScalarVariable.description: Propulsion output shared with performance models.

ScalarVariable.name: thrust_in.exhaust_velocity_mps
ScalarVariable.description: Propulsion output shared with performance models.

ScalarVariable.name: orientation.roll_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Feedback for simulated sensors

ScalarVariable.name: orientation.pitch_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Feedback for simulated sensors

ScalarVariable.name: orientation.yaw_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Feedback for simulated sensors

ScalarVariable.name: location.x_km
ScalarVariable.description: Local navigation frame expressed in kilometers (x=North, y=East, z=Up).

ScalarVariable.name: location.y_km
ScalarVariable.description: Local navigation frame expressed in kilometers (x=North, y=East, z=Up).

ScalarVariable.name: location.z_km
ScalarVariable.description: Local navigation frame expressed in kilometers (x=North, y=East, z=Up).

ScalarVariable.name: flight_status.airspeed_mps
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: flight_status.energy_state_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: flight_status.angle_of_attack_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: flight_status.climb_rate
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: flight_status.health_code
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.
